title: Consolidate KD Platform work: ICP-native user count seeding + admin add-user UI (no Node/MySQL)

requirements.text: Ensure the KD Platform dashboard user count works on a fresh deployment by seeding at least one user record in the Motoko canister when the platform is first initialized (so the dashboard does not show 0 unless the admin explicitly clears users).

quotes: Add all work in my web

acceptanceCriteria: On a brand-new deployment, after initializing access control, `getTotalUsers()` returns a value >= 1 for an authorized caller.
The seed operation is idempotent (re-initialization does not create duplicate seed users).
If the users map is non-empty, the seed logic does not modify existing users.

requirements.text: Add a minimal admin-only user management workflow that replaces the user’s requested Web2 register/login approach: expose an admin-only canister method to add users (name + email) and a frontend form on the KD dashboard to call it.

quotes: You want clean, structured, complete A-to-Z full-stack HTTP + HTML + API coding blueprint from absolute start to production.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend: an admin-only method exists to add a user record with name + email, and it updates the total user count.
Frontend: KD Dashboard shows an “Admin” section (only when the caller is an admin) with inputs for name and email and an “Add user” action.
After adding a user via the UI, the “Total Users” card updates (via React Query invalidation/refetch) and displays the new count.
Non-admin callers cannot add users (backend enforces authorization and frontend does not render the admin form).

requirements.text: Add a KD Platform dashboard guard that prompts the user to authenticate with Internet Identity before loading protected KD dashboard data, using clear English user-facing messaging.

quotes: Then I execute the next step precisely.

acceptanceCriteria: If the user is not authenticated/authorized to call `getTotalUsers()`, the KD dashboard displays a friendly sign-in prompt in English instead of a generic error.
After signing in, the dashboard loads and displays the live total user count.
No changes are made to immutable hook files (Internet Identity hooks remain unmodified).

constraints: Do not implement or add Node.js/Express, JWT authentication, MySQL, Netlify Identity, or Netlify Functions in this project.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (all logic in backend/main.mo); only add backend/migration.mo changes if required for stable state upgrades (conditional migration policy).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files in frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Implementing Perplexity (or any other) AI proxy/LLM integration.
Implementing Web2 email/password registration/login flows (bcrypt/JWT) or any external database schema.
Adding third-party auth providers beyond Internet Identity.
